results.title: Amazon Q4 2025 Earnings: Revenue $187 Billion, AWS Growth Accelerates to 19%
results.snippet: Amazon reported Q4 2025 net sales of $187.4 billion, up 10% year-over-year. AWS revenue grew 19% to $28.8 billion, reaccelerating on AI demand. Operating income was $21.2 billion, the fourth consecutive record quarter. Advertising Services revenue grew 18% to $17.3 billion. Amazon Web Services operating margin expanded to 37.1%, generating $10.7 billion in segment operating income.

results.title: AWS Secures $12 Billion in AI Infrastructure Commitments from Enterprise Customers
results.snippet: Amazon Web Services has secured multi-year AI infrastructure commitments totalling over $12 billion from enterprise and government customers, including contracts with the US intelligence community. AWS CEO Matt Garman highlighted Amazon Bedrock as the preferred platform for enterprises building generative AI applications. Amazon's investment in Anthropic — approximately $4 billion — gives AWS exclusive cloud priority access to Claude models.

results.title: Amazon Advertising Passes $17 Billion Quarterly; Prime Video Ads Ramping
results.snippet: Amazon's Advertising Services segment generated $17.3 billion in Q4 2025 revenue, up 18% year-over-year, cementing its position as the third-largest digital advertising platform behind Google and Meta. Amazon introduced ads on Prime Video globally in early 2024; Prime Video advertising revenue is on track to exceed $3 billion annually in 2025. Amazon Prime has over 230 million paying members worldwide.

results.title: Amazon Launches Same-Day Pharmacy Delivery in 20 US Cities on February 3, 2026
results.snippet: Amazon expanded its same-day prescription delivery service to 20 major US cities on February 3, 2026, through Amazon Pharmacy. The service delivers medications within 24 hours for Prime members. Amazon has invested over $3.9 billion in healthcare in the past three years, including the $3.9 billion acquisition of One Medical in 2023. Analysts estimate Amazon's healthcare segment could generate $10 billion in revenue by 2027.
